candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total; inferior to the explicit total current assets line.
Non-current assets, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total for current assets.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line; preferred over cash-flow beginning/end balances.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of the year
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash can reconcile, but balance sheet cash is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the year
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not the balance-sheet stock variable targeted here.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash balance.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Balancing line rather than the reported total.
Cash-flow change line, not the stock of current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best semantic fit for short-term debt/current borrowings; explicitly current and interest-bearing, and excludes leases by label.
Could represent borrowings, but appears in both current and non-current sections, so the unlabeled row is more ambiguous than the explicit current interest-bearing liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year
candidates.why: Current debt-like item but lease-related, which should be excluded from STD baseline.
Lease liabilities are explicitly excluded from STD baseline.

variables.notes: Chose an exact current debt label from the balance sheet even though preview values are blank; blank preview does not invalidate a semantically correct label. Excluded lease-related rows per instructions.

candidates.why: Tax-related but non-current deferred tax, not taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Tax asset, not tax payable.
Cash flow item, not balance-sheet taxes payable.

variables.notes: No clear balance-sheet row for taxes payable/current tax liabilities is present in the provided statements.

candidates.why: Exact match for PPE and preferred net/total PPE line.
Gross tangible assets, but total/net PPE line is preferred when available.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Capex flow, not the balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit PPE stock line on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.
Exact match for net cash flow from operating activities; preferred over pre-working-capital subtotal.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before change in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not the reported cash flow measure.
